## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run docs:build`
- [ ] Not run; reason:

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] Preserves approval gates before irreversible actions.
- [ ] Avoids exposing secrets, private source, raw prompts, or sensitive artifacts in logs.
- [ ] Updates docs for user-facing workflow, commands, environment variables, or terminology changes.
- [ ] Adds or updates tests for state machine, OpenCode orchestration, retry, artifact, or UI behavior changes.
